channel.title: Microbiome Digest
channel.description: Daily automated digest of microbiome research
channel.itunes:author: Veronica Llorens
channel.itunes:summary: Daily automated digest of microbiome research

item.title: Daily Podcast 2026-03-10
item.description: New research on pine needles reveals that specialized transfusion parenchyma cells actively regulate water and sugar transport through a starch-driven osmotic mechanism. | A new review in Nature Medicine explores how the gut microbiome influences the effectiveness of cancer immunotherapy. | New research from bioRxiv reveals that fasting boosts small intestinal regeneration after radiation damage through a microbiome-driven mechanism.
item.itunes:author: Veronica Llorens
item.itunes:summary: New research on pine needles reveals that specialized transfusion parenchyma cells actively regulate water and sugar transport through a starch-driven osmotic mechanism. | A new review in Nature Medicine explores how the gut microbiome influences the effectiveness of cancer immunotherapy. | New research from bioRxiv reveals that fasting boosts small intestinal regeneration after radiation damage through a microbiome-driven mechanism.
